backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining user profile management (sport, skill level, location permission) and helicopter booking via Google Calendar HTTP outcalls, with profile storage keyed by Principal.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—location enable/disable toggle and userMode state—to their affected frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key changes for every page and component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, radius, chart, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Sport Buddies SPA, mounting the React app at `#root` and loading the Vite entry module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining all application routes under two layouts (full nav and header-only), wrapped in QueryClientProvider and SportProvider with a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/BottomTabBar.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Home, Map, Events, Coins, Profile) using maroon background and gold active state, with exact-match detection for the Home tab.
frontend/src/components/DebugBanner.tsx: Debug overlay component displaying the current route, authentication status, and profile completion state as badge pills.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and shows a fallback UI with an error message and a Go Home button.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top header with the Sport Buddies logo/wordmark linking to home, a coin balance pill, a QR/UPC scan button, and an emergency shield button on the right.
Full-screen centered loading spinner shown as a Suspense or lazy-load fallback while the app initializes.
frontend/src/components/LocationPermissi: A modal dialog component that prompts the user to enable location access, with Cancel and Enable Location buttons and an optional requesting state.
frontend/src/components/PresenceBanner.t: A fixed top banner displaying a live sport presence status with an animated ping indicator that stops flashing after a specified timestamp.
frontend/src/components/ScreenBanner.tsx: A simple debug banner component that displays the current screen name and route name in a styled yellow bar.
frontend/src/context/SportContext.tsx: Defines the SportContext with types, initial seed event data, and localStorage helpers for managing sport activation status, user mode, events, and related state across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActivationStatus.t: A hook that manages a timed 'OUT_NOW' activation status persisted in localStorage, providing activate, countdown, and expiry logic over a 10-second window.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: A hook that tracks attended event IDs in localStorage, awards 5 coins on first attendance, and synchronizes state across tabs via custom events.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoinBalance.ts: A hook that manages a persistent coin balance in localStorage and synchronizes updates across components using a custom browser event.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoinScanner.ts: A hook that wraps QR scanning to validate scanned codes against a predefined list, awards coins for unclaimed valid codes, and tracks claimed codes in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useEventJoinState.ts: A hook that persists joined event IDs and participant count overrides in localStorage, providing join/leave actions and cross-tab synchronization via custom events.
frontend/src/hooks/useHelicopterAvailabi: React Query hook that checks helicopter availability by calling the backend actor's `checkHelicopterAvailability` method and parsing the JSON response into busy time blocks.
React Query mutation hook that submits a helicopter booking to the backend actor and invalidates availability queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocationPermission: Hook that checks and requests browser geolocation permission, exposing the current permission state and a function to prompt the user for access.
frontend/src/hooks/usePresenceState.ts: Hook that manages a user's 'OUT_NOW' presence status in localStorage, handling activation, expiry after 10 minutes, and a short flash indicator period.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend interactions including completing a user profile, checking profile completion status, and fetching the user profile.
frontend/src/hooks/useRedemptions.ts: Hook that manages reward redemptions stored in localStorage, supporting adding new redemptions with generated codes and retrieving them by ID.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining the Sport Buddies maroon/gold/black brand theme via CSS custom properties and Tailwind base styles, plus utility classes for buttons, inputs, and scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/ActivateSportScreen.t: Screen that lets users select and activate a sport, handling location permission checks and toggling presence state. Navigates to the map on activation and updates localStorage with sport/status info.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Authentication page that provides Sign In and Sign Up buttons using Internet Identity. After login, checks if the user's profile is complete and redirects to home or profile setup accordingly.
frontend/src/pages/CoinGrabPage.tsx: QR code scanning page that awards coins when a valid, unclaimed code is scanned. Tracks claimed codes in localStorage and shows success/error feedback via toasts.
frontend/src/pages/CoinsPage.tsx: Coins dashboard displaying the user's coin balance and action cards for earning coins via helicopter reservation, UPC/QR scanning, and friend invites.
frontend/src/pages/CreateEventPage.tsx: Placeholder page for creating a sport event, optionally pre-filling the sport from URL search params. The actual event creation functionality is marked as coming in a future phase.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyPage.tsx: Minimal placeholder page that renders an 'Emergency' heading with basic layout styling.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyShieldPage.t: Emergency SOS page with a hold-to-activate button that triggers an emergency shield status after 2 seconds. When active, provides actions to notify buddies, notify an emergency contact, or call 911, with a cooldown and action log.
frontend/src/pages/EventDetailPage.tsx: Displays full details for a single event (date, location, participants, status) and provides actions for joining, leaving, completing, canceling, and marking attendance, with coin rewards for attendance.
frontend/src/pages/EventsPage.tsx: Lists all events with sport-filter chips that auto-sync with the active sport context, and allows navigation to event details or event creation.
frontend/src/pages/HelicopterPage.tsx: Form page for booking a helicopter ride that checks slot availability via a calendar API, validates passenger/weight inputs, and supports payment by card or coins (2000 coin cost).
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page with an Activate/Deactivate sport CTA, presence banner, and secondary navigation buttons for the map, helicopter booking, and other features.
frontend/src/pages/HowItWorksPage.tsx: Static informational page explaining the coin-earning steps (activating sport, scanning QR codes, attending events, redeeming in store) with a coin value reference table.
frontend/src/pages/InvitePage.tsx: Page that displays a shareable invite link with copy-to-clipboard and native share functionality, explaining the referral coin reward flow.
frontend/src/pages/MapPage.tsx: Displays a 'Nearby Buddies' map page with sport filters and a mock list of nearby users, syncing the active filter with the current sport from SportContext and showing live/offline status.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Renders a marketplace page with two tabs: a gear listing market (mock items with contact/view actions) and a pro shops directory, with toast notifications for interactions.
frontend/src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx: Simple 404 page that displays a 'Route Not Found' message and a button to navigate back to the home route.
frontend/src/pages/PresenceDetailPage.ts: Shows a detail view for a specific nearby buddy (looked up by ID from mock data), displaying their sport, status, distance, and action buttons to invite to an event or scan a QR code.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page allowing selection of presence status, user mode (normal/buddy finder), and location toggle, with persistence via localStorage and integration with SportContext and identity hooks.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Onboarding form for new users to set their name, primary sport, skill level, and location permission, submitting via the completeProfile mutation before navigating to the home route.
Displays the details of a single coin redemption including item name, cost, status, redemption code (with copy button), and claim instructions. Fetches the redemption by ID from URL params and shows a not-found state if missing.
frontend/src/pages/SafetyPage.tsx: Safety hub page with two feature cards—Emergency Shield and Emergency Notifications—each offering Setup (navigation) and Learn (toast info) actions.
frontend/src/pages/ScannerStubPage.tsx: Placeholder scanner page shown in preview/non-device environments, displaying a camera-unavailable message and description based on a 'type' query param (upc or qr).
frontend/src/pages/ScanPage.tsx: Scan landing page with two options—Scan UPC/CoinGrab and Scan QR Badge—both navigating to /coin-grab if camera is available, or showing a fallback toast in preview environments.
frontend/src/pages/SessionPage.tsx: Minimal page that displays a session ID extracted from URL params.
frontend/src/pages/SOSLogPage.tsx: Shows a list of past SOS/emergency events loaded from localStorage, displaying start time, duration, and actions taken per event. Includes a clear-all button with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/StorePage.tsx: Coin store page listing redeemable items filterable by category, showing the user's coin balance, and handling item redemption with a confirmation step before deducting coins and navigating to the redemption detail page.
frontend/src/services/calendarIntegratio: Stub service for Google Calendar integration providing mocked `getCalendarFreeBusy` and `createBookingEvent` functions that simulate API delays but always return available/a fake booking ID. Intended to be replaced with real Google Calendar API calls in production.
frontend/src/utils/safeNavigate.ts: Utility that validates a target route path against a whitelist of known valid prefixes before navigating, showing a 'Coming soon' toast for unrecognized routes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based semantic colors, Sport Buddies brand colors (maroon, gold, charcoal), border radii, box shadows, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the Sport Buddies project state at schema version 1.0.0, recording two existing features (location toggle and user mode switching) and their corresponding pending action requests, along with architectural notes about React state management.
